comment.body:
I would agree. The truly smart money sees through this administration and knows they will keep on extending deadlines. Alma in her june 22nd note said Bessent put and she has also written about stealth QE. Smart money knows this will be juiced further. The icing on the cake will be rate cuts. Street does not care about inflation or the common man or the tariffs at this point. The tariffs when they bite will be passed onto common consumers, companies are not impacted. 

Anyway long way of saying, market has priced all of that in. When the time is right smart money will also make money on the 10% fall and will ramp it back up. Literally this administration is telegraphing that they will pump all risky assets sky high ( crypto, stocks etc. ).
